description_long: This object consists of three mushrooms of varying sizes, each with a smooth, glossy, light brown cap that transitions to a darker, speckled edge. The caps are rounded and dome-shaped, with a subtle gradient from a creamy beige center to a brownish margin. The stems are slender, slightly curved, and have a gradient from a pale beige at the top to a darker brown at the base. The surface of the caps appears moist and reflective, suggesting a fresh, healthy state. No gills are visible from any angle, as the caps' undersides are not exposed. The mushrooms are grouped closely together, resembling a natural cluster that might be found in a park or garden setting.
description: A cluster of three glossy, light brown mushrooms with smooth, rounded caps and slender, gradient-colored stems.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three mushrooms aligned vertically, highlighting the smooth, shiny caps and the gradient on the stems.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the varying heights and curvatures of the stems, with the caps' glossiness and color gradient clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the largest mushroom, with the cap's rounded shape and the stem's color transition most prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cluster arrangement and the distinct curvature of the stems, with all three caps visible.
attribute_cap_pattern: smooth and glossy with subtle speckling at the edges
